01 — About

THE WRITER

3+ Years · Bilingual · Riyadh

Detail-oriented creative copywriter with 3+ years of experience developing effective marketing campaigns for diverse clients across Saudi Arabia.

Skilled at turning brand insights into clear, resonant concepts — from KV scripts and social copy to articles and packaging. Fluent in both Arabic and English, maintaining a distinct platform-specific tone in each.

Currently pursuing screenwriting, with specialized training at SPT Academy and The Righters House.

Buheis Creative
Creative Copywriter
  • Lead bilingual ideation and copy across full campaign lifecycles — from strategy briefs to final KV headlines, broadcast scripts, and OOH executions

Copywriter

Hajj Season 2024
Al Riffadh
Copywriter

Soomline
Project Manager Asst.

Freelance Writer

04 — Project

JAWN

Founder · 2020–2022
JAWN
جَون · منصة كتّاب العرب

An online platform founded to gather Arab writers in a single creative space — built on the belief that Arabic literary voices deserve a dedicated, curated home on the internet.

As founder and director, managed a team of writers, curated cross-genre submissions, developed editorial calendars, and implemented SEO strategy.
